title: ACADIA Pharmaceuticals (ACAD) Stock Forecast, Price Targets and Analysts Predictions
text: ACADIA Pharmaceuticals analyst consensus and price targets. Based on 16 Wall Street analysts offering 12-month price targets for ACADIA Pharmaceuticals in the last 3 months, the average price target is $32.53 with a high forecast of $40.00 and a low forecast of $23.00. ACADIA Pharmaceuticals has 44.07% upside potential based on analysts' average price target. In the current month, ACAD has received 28 Buy Ratings, 14 Hold Ratings, and 0 Sell Ratings. ACADIA Pharmaceuticals has a consensus rating of Moderate Buy. The consensus estimate for ACADIA Pharmaceuticals' current full-year earnings is $0.70 per share. Cantor Fitzgerald analyst J. Kim forecasts that the biopharmaceutical company will earn $0.85 per share for the year, with Cantor Fitzgerald currently having a Strong Buy rating. Next quarter's earnings estimate for ACAD is $0.06 with a range of -$0.04 to $0.17.
